description: Update the clinical indication for a pending imaging request in HospitalRun. Dr. Smith ordered a Chest X-ray for patient 'Gregory Peck' (Patient ID: P_GREGORY), but the radiology department rejected it because the clinical indication 'Cough' was too vague. Locate this existing pending request and update the clinical indication/notes to exactly: 'Rule out Pneumonia'. Do not create a new request; you must update the existing one.
